1. Each birth record represents one liveborn infant.
2. County-level data are shown only for counties with populations of 100,000 persons or more. Within each state, data for all
counties with fewer than 100,000 persons are combined together under the label "Unidentified Counties."
3. Connecticut population data for 2022-2024 are reported in the "Unidentified counties" row because population estimates for
Connecticut legacy counties are not available for 2022-2024. Birth and Fertility rate are not available for 2022-2024 because
legacy Connecticut counties population estimates are not available.
